Don't bother. You've already paid, stup: It looks like yesterday's unfinished dinner.

「別費事了。你早就付過了，傻瓜。」: 這些匕首製作精良，顯然是為了投擲而設計。除了首領盜賊似乎無窮無盡的收藏外，還有兩套配對的匕首，柄部顏色不同，用來玩「匕首擲準遊戲」。

Don't bother. You've already paid, stup: Stealing from a dagger-throwing thief?   That's a dangerous -- and stupid -- idea!

Don't bother. You've already paid, stup: The table is as rough as the man sitting next to it.
「別費事了。你早就付過了，傻瓜。」: 桌子和坐在旁邊的傢伙一樣粗糙。

Don't bother. You've already paid, stup: Dag-Nab-It board.
「別費事了。你早就付過了，傻瓜。」: 匕首擲準遊戲木板。

Don't bother. You've already paid, stup: The trapdoor allows access to the bar above.
「別費事了。你早就付過了，傻瓜。」: 活板門連通樓上的酒吧。

Don't bother. You've already paid, stup: Don't open the lid!  Who knows what will jump out?!
「別費事了。你早就付過了，傻瓜。」: 別打開蓋子！誰知道會跳出什麼東西？！

Don't bother. You've already paid, stup: The barred window lets in the foul stench from the alley.
「別費事了。你早就付過了，傻瓜。」: 有鐵條的窗戶讓巷子裡的惡臭飄進來。

Don't bother. You've already paid, stup: The barrel is too heavy to pick up.
「別費事了。你早就付過了，傻瓜。」: 酒桶太重了，拿不起來。

Don't bother. You've already paid, stup: The barrels are empty and smell of sour beer.
「別費事了。你早就付過了，傻瓜。」: 酒桶是空的，聞起來像酸啤酒。

Don't bother. You've already paid, stup: Alms?  Alms for the poor?
「別費事了。你早就付過了，傻瓜。」: 「施捨？誰能施捨一點給窮人？」

Don't bother. You've already paid, stup: A word of warning to you -- don't drink the Dragon's Breath!
「別費事了。你早就付過了，傻瓜。」: 「給你個忠告──別喝龍息酒！」

Don't bother. You've already paid, stup: A Beggar gets cash only when others get cash, and nobody's got much money here right now, 'cept maybe the Brigands.
「別費事了。你早就付過了，傻瓜。」: 「乞丐只有在別人有錢的時候才有錢，現在這裡沒人有多少錢，除了可能的山賊們。」

Don't bother. You've already paid, stup: Rumor has it someone smart took over.  Organized them, trained them -- that sort of thing, maybe.  Nowadays, no one's safe outside of town.
「別費事了。你早就付過了，傻瓜。」: 「傳言說有個聰明的傢伙接管了他們。組織他們、訓練他們──這類事情，也許吧。現在，城外沒人是安全的。」

Don't bother. You've already paid, stup: Up to that time, the Brigands were just pains -- dumb guys who sometimes tried to beat up traders outside of town.
「別費事了。你早就付過了，傻瓜。」: 「在那之前，山賊只是麻煩──一些蠢傢伙偶爾會在城外毆打商人。」

Don't bother. You've already paid, stup: They sure hurt business.  No one's getting rich but them.
「別費事了。你早就付過了，傻瓜。」: 「他們確實破壞生意。除了他們以外誰都賺不到錢。」

Don't bother. You've already paid, stup: There's honest work up at the Baron's castle, I hear.  But begging's my business.
「別費事了。你早就付過了，傻瓜。」: 「聽說男爵城堡裡有誠實的工作。但要飯是我的行當。」

Don't bother. You've already paid, stup: I heard Amblin got scared of the Brigands and decided to move away. I still remember the taste of his cider, it was so good.  It was called, 'Amblin Entertainment' from Spielburg.
「別費事了。你早就付過了，傻瓜。」: 「聽說安布林被山賊嚇跑了。我還記得他的蘋果酒味道好極了。那叫『安布林娛樂』，來自史畢柏格。」

Don't bother. You've already paid, stup: He works at the tavern.  He lives up to his name.
「別費事了。你早就付過了，傻瓜。」: 「他在酒館工作。他真是名副其實。」

Don't bother. You've already paid, stup: Nobody's ever lived to talk what the Night Gaunts are.  I sure don't want to find out.
「別費事了。你早就付過了，傻瓜。」: 「沒人活著說過夜影怪是什麼。我可不想去發現。」

Don't bother. You've already paid, stup: I have lots of luck, it's just that it's bad.
「別費事了。你早就付過了，傻瓜。」: 「我運氣多著呢，只是都是壞運氣。」

Don't bother. You've already paid, stup: My name is Sam.  I've lived here for five years now, and I think I'll be heading on once the pass clears of snow.  There's supposed to be some good begging towns to the south.  Nice talking to you.  Alms for the poor, Alms!
「別費事了。你早就付過了，傻瓜。」: 「我叫山姆。我在這兒住了五年，等山路積雪融化我就要離開了。聽說南邊有些不錯的要飯城鎮。很高興跟你聊天。施捨給窮人，施捨啊！」

Don't bother. You've already paid, stup: I remember when people used to stroll around town after dark.  There's a spell on Spielburg so that it glows at night.  Now, the only people out late are the thieves.
「別費事了。你早就付過了，傻瓜。」: 「我記得以前天黑後人們還會在城裡漫步。史畢柏格有法術讓它在夜裡發光。現在，只有盜賊敢出來活動。」

Don't bother. You've already paid, stup: And out of town, man, you don't dare be out there without a light when the sun goes down.  The Night Gaunts'll get you.
「別費事了。你早就付過了，傻瓜。」: 「城外的傢伙，太陽一下山你都不敢沒著火光出去。夜影怪會抓住你。」

Don't bother. You've already paid, stup: Heard Silmaria is a good place to be.  It's by the sea.  Think I'll head there after this.
「別費事了。你早就付過了，傻瓜。」: 「聽說西爾馬里亞是個好地方。在海邊。我想等這陣子過了就去那兒。」

Don't bother. You've already paid, stup: I've heard talk that some kind of magic keeps things peaceful around here. Folks just don't feel like fighting in town, 'cept maybe Crusher.
「別費事了。你早就付過了，傻瓜。」: 「我聽說某種魔法讓這兒保持平靜。人們就是不想在城裡打架，除了可能克拉什。」

Don't bother. You've already paid, stup: Kind of wonder about this alley at times, though.  Feels funny -- sort of like the spell missed it.  It's dark at night, too.
「別費事了。你早就付過了，傻瓜。」: 「但我有時候在想這條巷子。感覺怪怪的──好像法術漏掉了它。夜裡也很黑。」

Don't bother. You've already paid, stup: I'm not usually bothered by them, since I don't have much to steal.  They are around, though.  It's not safe to sleep in the streets at night.  Outside you get eaten, inside you get robbed.
「別費事了。你早就付過了，傻瓜。」: 「他們通常不理我，因為我沒什麼可偷的。但他們確實在。晚上在街上睡覺不安全。在外面會被吃掉，在裡面會被搶。」

Don't bother. You've already paid, stup: Tourists used to come here regularly for the Spielburg Cider Festival. After the cider industry closed, not much point for the festival without the cider part.
「別費事了。你早就付過了，傻瓜。」: 「遊客以前常來參加史畢柏格蘋果酒節。蘋果酒產業關閉後，沒有蘋果酒的節慶就沒意義了。」

Don't bother. You've already paid, stup: Understand this used to be a great place to be.   Traders going in and out; tourists coming and going... perfect begging conditions.
「別費事了。你早就付過了，傻瓜。」: 「聽說這兒曾經是個不錯的地方。商人進出、遊客來去……要飯的天堂。」

Don't bother. You've already paid, stup: Things were starting to dry up about the time I got here, just my luck.  The Brigands started getting tough.
「別費事了。你早就付過了，傻瓜。」: 「我到這兒的時候事情就開始蕭條了，真是我的運氣。山賊變得兇狠起來。」

Don't bother. You've already paid, stup: Traders used to stop here on the way south to pick up barrels of some special cider made here by a guy named Amblin.
「別費事了。你早就付過了，傻瓜。」: 「商人以前南下時會在這兒停下來，買一些安布林做的特製蘋果酒。」

Don't bother. You've already paid, stup: You can get a job cleaning the stable, I understand.  It's great if you want to build up muscles or have a place to spend the night, but you won't get rich. I'd rather beg, myself.
「別費事了。你早就付過了，傻瓜。」: 「據我所知，你可以找個打掃馬廄的工作。如果想練肌肉或找個地方睡覺，那很不錯，但不會發財。我還是比較喜歡要飯。」

Don't bother. You've already paid, stup: Stealing from a beggar is not a heroic action.
「別費事了。你早就付過了，傻瓜。」: 從乞丐手裡偷東西不是英雄的舉動。

Don't bother. You've already paid, stup: Thank-you.  I really like apples.
「別費事了。你早就付過了，傻瓜。」: 「謝謝你。我真的很喜歡蘋果。」

Don't bother. You've already paid, stup: A thin man with very patched clothing holds out an empty bowl.  It's the standard Beggar's bowl every beggar is issued when he graduates from an acredited Beggar's School.
「別費事了。你早就付過了，傻瓜。」: 一個衣衫襤褸的瘦男人伸出空碗。這是每個從認可的乞丐學校畢業的乞丐都會拿到的標準要飯碗。

Don't bother. You've already paid, stup: A thin man with very patched clothing holds out a bowl containing only your kind contribution.
「別費事了。你早就付過了，傻瓜。」: 一個衣衫襤褸的瘦男人伸出碗，裡面只有你慈悲的施捨。

Don't bother. You've already paid, stup: Thanks.  You know, it's really tough trying to make a living begging in this town since the brigands started scaring all the trade away.
「別費事了。你早就付過了，傻瓜。」: 「謝謝。你知道，自從山賊把生意都嚇跑了，在這城鎮靠要飯維生就變得非常困難。」

Don't bother. You've already paid, stup: This used to be such a nice place to live.  My advice to you is not to take up begging.  It just doesn't pay.  And don't go out at night.
「別費事了。你早就付過了，傻瓜。」: 「這地方以前很不錯。我給你的建議是別從事要飯行業。根本賺不到錢。而且別在晚上出門。」

Don't bother. You've already paid, stup: Looks like you're about as broke as I am!
「別費事了。你早就付過了，傻瓜。」: 「看起來你窮得跟我一樣！」

Don't bother. You've already paid, stup: Thank-you.  Hilde's vegetables are always good.
「別費事了。你早就付過了，傻瓜。」: 「謝謝你。希爾德的蔬菜總是很好吃。」

Don't bother. You've already paid, stup: Begging
「別費事了。你早就付過了，傻瓜。」: 要飯

Don't bother. You've already paid, stup: Cash
「別費事了。你早就付過了，傻瓜。」: 現金

Don't bother. You've already paid, stup: Cider
「別費事了。你早就付過了，傻瓜。」: 蘋果酒
